relations.note: Adjacency decor prohibition relies on sections being self-contained blocks.
Adjacency dark-section rule is enabled by declared background colors in section metadata.

quotes: self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color
Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.

rules.intent: Guarantee modular sections stack cleanly without external spacing dependencies.
rules.rule_text: Each section is a self-contained <table>-based block at the 600px email body width (size.canvas.email_body_width_600 = 600px) with its own top/bottom 32px padding (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px) and a declared background color. There are no margins outside the section — assembly is direct stacking.

quotes: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

rules.intent: Provide the assembler the information needed to stack sections and resolve footnotes/backgrounds correctly.
rules.rule_text: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes dermatomyositis (DM), footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

quotes: Footnote symbols: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time** — sections use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

rules.intent: Prevent footnote symbol collisions across independently authored sections.
rules.rule_text: Footnote symbols are superscript and assigned in order of appearance at assembly time. Sections must use placeholder tokens (e.g., {{fn1}}) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).

rules.intent: Ensure sections remain self-contained since locked components are inserted independently.
rules.rule_text: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above or below (e.g., a wave meant to continue into the footer).

quotes: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections
Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

rules.intent: Maintain visual rhythm and section separation across the email.
rules.rule_text: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

quotes: All colors in code as HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (email client compatibility); `bgcolor` attributes duplicated for Outlook.

rules.rule_text: All colors in code must be HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (for email client compatibility); bgcolor attributes must be duplicated for Outlook.
